start.welcomeNew:
Welcome! I'll help you track your spending.

Start by adding a category.

common.chooseFromMenu: Choose an action from the menu.
common.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please start over.

category.typePrompt: What type of category do you want to create?
category.none: You don't have any categories yet.

flow.addAtLeastOneExpenseCategory: Add at least one category first.
flow.addAtLeastOneIncomeCategory: Add at least one income category first.

stat.whatToView: What do you want to view?

addCategoryFirst.expense: Add at least one expense category first.
addCategoryFirst.income: Add at least one income category first.

nothingForPeriod.expense: No expenses for the selected period 🙂
nothingForPeriod.income: No income for the selected period 🙂
